subscription.title: Subscription Plans
subscription.boost_note: Subscription minutes are used first. Boost minutes kick in when subscription runs out.
subscription.asr_desc: +120 min for $4.99 — use with Cloud ASR mode
subscription.asr_note: Select "Voxclar Cloud ASR" in Settings to use.
subscription.invite_desc: Share your code — both of you get bonus minutes
subscription.invite_share: Share this code with friends when they sign up
subscription.invite_step1: Friend signs up with your code →
subscription.plan_pro_feat3: Sonnet 4.6 / GPT-5.4 / DeepSeek R1 powered answers

settings.title: Settings
settings.audio_mac: macOS: Uses ScreenCaptureKit to capture system audio (requires Screen Recording permission)
settings.audio_win: Windows: Uses WASAPI loopback to capture system audio
settings.caption_lang_desc: Language for speech recognition (Voxclar Cloud ASR)
settings.api_key_desc: Use this key to access the Voxclar Cloud ASR API programmatically.
settings.generate_hint: Generate your API key for free. You'll need to purchase ASR minutes before making API calls.
settings.ai_keys_desc: Lifetime license — provide at least one API key below. You don't need all three.
settings.model_auto_desc: Auto: Claude for behavioral/technical, DeepSeek for general questions
settings.no_key_warning: Add at least one API key to use AI answers
settings.local_asr_desc: faster-whisper on your machine. Free & private. Requires Apple Silicon or decent CPU.
settings.cloud_asr_desc: Higher accuracy, real-time streaming, multi-language. Uses ASR minutes.
settings.cloud_asr_note: Cloud ASR uses your ASR minute balance. Buy minutes in the Subscription page.
